goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'arrive by 13:00' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'park' and should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should leave on sunday
The train should arrive by 13:00 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of park and should be in the north
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
